title: Building Agent Interfaces: Lessons from Chrome DevTools (MCP) for Agents — Michael Hablich, Google
summary: Michael Hablich describes building Chrome DevTools MCP for agents through three failed iterations and the fixes that worked. Key lessons include using semantic summaries for trace files, rewriting error messages for agent self-healing, measuring tokens per successful outcome, and deliberately maintaining autoconnect friction to prevent prompt injection.
